Airlift.description: Alo's high-compression signature performance fabric. Ultralightweight double-knit construction with a subtle sheen and second-skin feel. Designed for high-intensity workouts and hot yoga.
Airlift.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach, do not iron

Airbrush.description: Alo's original signature performance fabric. Medium compression with a matte, cotton-like finish. Sculpts and smooths with flatlock seaming for comfort. Thicker and more durable than Airlift.
Airbrush.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach, do not iron

Alosoft.description: Alo's ultra-soft, velvety performance fabric. Designed for lounging, restorative yoga, and low-impact movement. The softest fabric in the Alo line.
Alosoft.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach, do not iron

Alo Softsculpt.description: A newer Alo signature fabric combining softness with medium-high compression. Designed for the wearer who wants both comfort and sculpting.
Alo Softsculpt.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach, do not iron

Conquer.description: Alo's men's performance fabric. Lightweight, breathable, and quick-drying. Designed for training and high-movement activities.
Conquer.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach

Alo Vapor.description: Alo's lightest men's fabric. Ultra-breathable with a featherweight feel. Designed for yoga and low-impact movement.
Alo Vapor.care: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low, do not bleach

products.name: High-Waist Airlift Legging
products.fit: True to size — designed for a snug, compressive fit
products.description: The Alo bestseller. Made from high-compression Airlift fabric with a subtle sheen and a second-skin feel. The double-layered waistband holds you in and the full-length leg hits at the ankle. Sculpts, lifts, and breathes.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.
products.restocking_frequency: Core color — in stock continuously. Seasonal colors rotate quarterly.

products.name: 7/8 High-Waist Airlift Legging
products.fit: True to size — designed for a snug, compressive fit
products.length: 7/8 — above the ankle, ideal for petites or an above-the-ankle look
products.description: All the sculpting, sheeny, high-compression benefits of the full-length Airlift legging in a 7/8 length — perfect for petites or an above-the-ankle fit. Pick your color and wear on repeat.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.
products.restocking_frequency: Core colors continuously stocked. Limited edition colors may sell out permanently.

products.name: 7/8 High-Waist Airbrush Legging
products.fit: True to size — designed for medium compression and a smoothing, sculpting fit
products.waistband: Wide high-rise waistband, no side seams
products.description: The 7/8 version of the classic High-Waist Airbrush Legging. The smoothing, sculpting Airbrush performance knit with no side seams and flatlock seaming for comfort. Studio-perfect and street-cool.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.
products.restocking_frequency: Core SKU. Continuously stocked in Black and White.

products.name: High-Waist Airbrush Legging
products.fit: True to size — designed for medium compression and a smoothing sculpting fit
products.description: Alo's OG bestselling legging. Sculpts, lifts, contours and smooths. Made with the signature Airbrush performance knit — medium compression with a matte, cotton-like finish. Features flatlock seaming for comfort and a lined gusset panel.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: ALO Softsculpt High-Waist Legging
products.description: Combines the softness you want with the compression you need. Softsculpt fabric feels luxuriously soft against skin while sculpting and smoothing. A versatile everyday legging.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.
products.restocking_frequency: Core SKU. Continuously stocked in Black.

products.name: High-Waist Alosoft Lounge Legging
products.fit: True to size — relaxed, loungy feel
products.description: If you've ever wanted to wear something that feels like nothing at all, this is it. The Alosoft Lounge Legging is made from Alo's velvety-soft Alosoft fabric and designed for lounging, light movement, and all the in-betweens.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: Airlift High-Waist Suit Up Legging
products.fit: True to size — high compression, sculpting
products.waistband: Double-layered wide waistband with contrast piping
products.description: The Suit Up Legging takes Alo's bestselling Airlift fabric and elevates it with a sleek color-blocked design and contrast piping. Perfect for the yogi who wants to look as good as they perform.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.
products.restocking_frequency: Seasonal color updates. Core colorways restocked quarterly.

products.name: Airbrush High-Waist Heart Throb Legging
features: Heart-shaped cut-out detail at back of knee
products.description: The Airbrush legging you already love, now with a heart-shaped cut-out detail at the back of the knee. Because your workout should have a little heart in it.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: High-Waist Airlift Flare Legging
products.fit: True to size — high compression through hip and thigh, flared from knee
products.description: Alo's most sculpting Airlift fabric in an on-trend flare silhouette. High compression through the hip and thigh, flaring out from the knee for a sleek, elongating look.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: High-Waist Goddess Ribbed Legging
products.length: Full-length — can be worn over the heel or scrunched at ankle
products.description: Alo's original patented Goddess Legging. The ribbed leg design can be worn long over the heel or scrunched at the ankle for a different look. Made from Alo's sculpting, lifting Airbrush fabric.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: Alosoft Goddess Ribbed Legging
products.fit: True to size — soft and relaxed
products.length: Full-length — can be worn over heel or scrunched
products.description: The Goddess Legging you love, now in Alo's ultra-soft Alosoft fabric. All the ribbed goddess silhouette with a velvety-soft feel. Wear over the heel or scrunch at the ankle.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: High-Waist Alosoft Flow Legging
products.description: A minimalist's dream. The Alosoft Flow Legging features a skinny waistband and clean lines — serious yoga vibes with lounge appeal. Ultra-soft Alosoft fabric makes it the legging you never want to take off.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: High-Waist Moto Legging
features: Ribbed panels at knee and thigh
products.description: The city-inspired, patented Moto Legging. Studio functionality meets street-ready style with Airbrush fabric and statement ribbed panels at the knee and thigh.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: Warrior Compression Pant
features: Can be worn alone or layered under shorts
products.description: Performance compression pant for men. Made from ultimate performance nylon-spandex fabric that wicks moisture and moves with you. Full gusset and double inseam panel for ease of movement. Wear solo or layer under your favorite short.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron.

products.name: 7" Circuit Short
products.description: The go-to men's training short. Conquer performance fabric with a 7" inseam, built-in liner, side pockets, and 4-way stretch. Made to move.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

products.name: 5" Repetition Short
products.description: For those who like their shorts on the shorter side. The 5" Repetition Short is built for high-output training with a built-in liner and 4-way stretch Conquer fabric.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

products.name: Conquer Max Performance Jogger
products.description: The ultimate performance jogger. Tapered silhouette in Conquer fabric with zippered pockets, ribbed cuffs, and 4-way stretch. Looks as good as it performs.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

products.name: Conquer Reform Crewneck Short Sleeve
products.description: A clean, versatile performance crewneck. The Reform Short Sleeve is made from Conquer fabric and designed for training, yoga, and everything in between.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

products.name: ALO Vapor Crewneck Short Sleeve
products.description: Made from Alo's lightest fabric, the Vapor Crewneck feels like wearing almost nothing. Ultra-breathable and featherweight — the go-to for hot yoga and warm-weather movement.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach.

products.name: Airlift Intrigue Bra
products.description: The Airlift Intrigue Bra delivers medium support in Alo's signature compressive Airlift fabric. A racerback design with removable padding for a customizable fit.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron. Remove padding before washing.

products.name: Airbrush Strapless Bra
products.description: A clean, minimal strapless sports bra in Airbrush fabric. Light support with a wide band and removable padding. Style and function for low-impact movement.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron. Remove padding before washing.

products.name: Airlift Suit Up Bra
features: Designed to match Suit Up Legging
products.description: The matching bra to the Airlift Suit Up Legging. Medium-high support with color-blocked Airlift fabric and contrast piping. Designed to be worn as a coordinated set.
products.care_instructions: Machine wash cold, tumble dry low. Do not bleach or iron. Remove padding before washing.
products.restocking_frequency: Seasonal, aligned with Suit Up Legging restocking.

products.name: Warrior Mat
products.material: Natural rubber + PU leather top layer
products.description: Alo's premium Warrior Mat combines a natural rubber base with a PU leather top for superior grip and cushioning. Alignment lines help with positioning. Carry strap included.
products.care_instructions: Wipe clean with a damp cloth and mild soap. Do not machine wash. Air dry away from direct sunlight.

products.name: Alo Sport Water Bottle
products.description: Stay hydrated in style. The Alo Sport Water Bottle is double-wall vacuum insulated to keep your drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. Leak-proof lid with a wide mouth for easy filling.
products.care_instructions: Hand wash recommended. Not dishwasher safe. Do not microwave.
